Text:
A word about the weather.

We know it has not been the most summery of starts to June in Hitchin, but do not let that put you off. The festival marquee is large, fully covered and has plenty of space to keep everyone comfortable and dry. Whatever the sky is doing outside, inside it is warm, welcoming and there are around 200 real ales, ciders, perries and meads waiting for you.

Doors are open today until 11pm. Come and join us.

https://hitchinbeerciderfestival.org.uk/
or visit the link in our bio.

4th to 6th June 2026
King George V Playing Fields, Old Hale Way, Hitchin, SG5 1XL

#HitchinBeerFestival #HBCF2026 #RealAle #RealCider #CAMRA #Hitchin #NorthHerts #Hertfordshire #SupportLocal #CommunityEvent

In partnership with CAMRA North Hertfordshire and Hitchin Rugby Club.
